nodes.name: privileges.sql
nodes.summary: Comprehensive PostgreSQL regression test for access privileges (GRANT/REVOKE), covering column, table, schema, function, and default privileges.

nodes.name: psql.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test for psql meta-commands and interactive features, verifying \d, \timing, variables, and formatted output.

nodes.name: psql_crosstab.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test for the crosstab function from the tablefunc extension, verifying pivot table generation.

nodes.name: publication.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test for logical replication publications, covering CREATE/ALTER/DROP PUBLICATION and publication membership.

nodes.name: random.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test for random number generation functions, verifying statistical properties of random() and setseed().

nodes.name: rangefuncs.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test for set-returning functions (SRFs), covering generate_series, unnest, JSON functions, and custom SRFs.

nodes.name: rangetypes.sql
nodes.summary: Comprehensive PostgreSQL regression test for range types, covering int4range, tsrange, custom ranges, containment, union, intersection, and GiST indexes.

nodes.name: regex.linux.utf8.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test for regular expressions on Linux with UTF-8 encoding, covering locale-specific regex matching behavior.

nodes.name: regex.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test for regular expression operators (~, ~*, !, !*), covering POSIX patterns, case sensitivity, and complex patterns.

nodes.name: regproc.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test for reg-type catalog reference types (regproc, regclass, regtype, etc.), verifying OID-to-name resolution.

nodes.name: reindex_catalog.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test for REINDEX on system catalog tables, verifying safe reindexing of catalog indexes without data corruption.

nodes.name: reloptions.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test for relation storage options (reloptions), covering fillfactor, autovacuum settings, and invalid option rejection.

nodes.name: replica_identity.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test for replica identity settings (FULL, INDEX, DEFAULT, NOTHING) and their effect on logical replication change streams.

nodes.name: resultcache.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test for the memoize (result cache) plan node, verifying caching behavior for repeated parameterized lookups.

nodes.name: returning.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test for RETURNING clauses on INSERT, UPDATE, and DELETE statements, verifying returned column values and expressions.

nodes.name: roleattributes.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test for role attributes (SUPERUSER, CREATEDB, CREATEROLE, LOGIN, etc.) and their inheritance and modification.

nodes.name: rowsecurity.sql
nodes.summary: Comprehensive PostgreSQL regression test for row-level security (RLS), covering policy creation, enforcement, bypass, and interactions with views.

nodes.name: rowtypes.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test for composite row types, covering record construction, field access, comparison, and use in functions.

nodes.name: rules.sql
nodes.summary: Comprehensive PostgreSQL regression test for query rewrite rules (CREATE RULE), covering view emulation, conditional rules, and rule interactions.

nodes.name: sanity_check.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression sanity check verifying that basic catalog integrity is intact at the end of the regression test suite.
